info.title: Timbal Platform API
info.description: Public API documentation for the Timbal platform

get.description: List organizations the authenticated user belongs to

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Optional search query to filter orgs by name

patch.description: Partially update an organization. Omitted fields are left unchanged. To explicitly clear a field, pass it as `null`.

get.description: List runs for a specific application

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter runs by start time (epoch timestamp in milliseconds)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter runs by end time (epoch timestamp in milliseconds)

patch.description: Update an existing platform run or link a local run with the platform

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.description:
This can be a platform-defined id or a custom id.
The platform will map the custom id to an internal one afterwards.

get.description: List connected domains for an organization

post.description: Add a custom domain to an organization

get.description: Get a domain by ID. This endpoint triggers DNS validation and returns the live certificate status.
List all available embedding models for the organization

post.description: Upload a file to an org

parameters.name: table_name
parameters.description: Table name to filter indexes by

post.description: Create a new index on a table
Insert or update rows into a table from a CSV file
Insert or update records into a table
Search for records in a table

200.description: Array of records matching the search query. Structure depends on the table schema and selected columns.

post.description: Connect a resource (KB or integration) to a project

patch.description: Set or clear the branch for an environment
Associate or disassociate a custom domain with an environment

post.description: Add a user to a project

delete.description: Remove a user from a project

patch.description: Update a user's role in a project

parameters.name: env_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of environment IDs to filter by

post.description: Invite a user to an organization

delete.description: Remove a user from an organization

patch.description: Update a user's role in an organization

model.description: Embedding model to use. See the list embedding models endpoint for available options.

with_gin_index.description: Whether to create a GIN index for the source column for faster hybrid search

column_names.description: List of column names to index. At least one column is required. Multiple columns will create a composite index

is_unique.description: Whether the index should enforce uniqueness

name.description: Index name. This must be unique in the entire Knowledge Base

project_env.description: Project environment this domain is linked to, if any

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp in epoch milliseconds

validation_records.description: DNS records required for SSL certificate validation

banner_url.description: URL of the organization's banner image

photo_url.description: URL of the organization's profile photo

content_length.description: The content length of the file in bytes

content_type.description: The content type of the file

created_at.description: The time the file was created

expires_at.description: The time the file expires at

url.description: The URL where the file can be accessed

group_id.description: The `group_id` filter applied to the query

user_id.description: The `user_id` filter applied to the query

banner_url.description: URL of the organization's banner image

n_projects.description: Number of projects in the organization

photo_url.description: URL of the organization's profile photo

role.description: Authenticated user's role in the organization

repository_url.description: When null, the project does not have the source code available.

embedding_names.description: List of embedding names to use for semantic search. Only a single column is supported at the moment.

fts_columns.description: List of column names to use for full-text search. When specified together with embedding_names, search will be hybrid (both semantic and full-text).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Number of results to skip before returning.

select_columns.description: List of column names to return in the search results. When not specified, all columns will be returned.

where.description: SQL WHERE expression to apply to the search. This feature is _experimental_ and may be removed or changed in the future.

name.description: When null, the branch will be cleared

parent_id.description:
This can be a platform-defined id or a custom id.
The platform will map the custom id to an internal one afterwards.

records.description: Array of records to insert or update (at least one record is required)

bearer_auth.description: Timbal API key. Obtain your API key from the Timbal platform settings. See [Authentication](/api-reference/authentication) for more information.
